name: CubeSmart
business: CubeSmart is a self-administered and self-managed real estate company that owns, operates, develops, manages, and acquires self-storage properties in the United States. It rents storage units to residential and commercial customers on a month-to-month basis, with approximately 399,000 customers as of December 31, 2025. No single customer represents a significant concentration of its revenues.

exposures.sentence: We are subject to risks from the consequences of climate change, including severe weather events, as well as the transition to a low-carbon economy and other steps taken to prevent or mitigate climate change.

catalysts.event: Completion of joint venture development property in New York
catalysts.sentence: As of December 31, 2025, we had one joint venture development property under construction, also in New York, which is expected to be completed during the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Board authorization of additional share repurchases
catalysts.sentence: Additionally, on February 24, 2026, the Board authorized additional share repurchases of up to 10.0 million of the Parent Company's outstanding common shares.
